headline: PTC Inc (PTC) Leveraging AI to Enhance Products and Boost Internal Efficiency
summary: PTC Inc (NASDAQ:PTC) is among the best 3D printing stocks to buy according to hedge funds. Presenting at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media and Telecom Conference 2026 on March 4, PTC Inc (NASDAQ:PTC) CEO Neil Barua highlighted the company’s growth prospects and plans for the future. Barua discussed how PTC Inc is enhancing its products […]

headline: Rosenblatt Maintains Buy on PTC, Lowers Price Target to $190
summary: Rosenblatt  analyst Blair Abernethy   maintains PTC (NASDAQ:PTC) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $200 to $190.
